expectedVerification: attempt 1 fails verification; the second fresh implementer passes
reviewRequirement: per the mode/risk matrix once verification passes
commitExpectation: one controller commit after the successful attempt
stop_condition: attempt 1 fails; a fresh implementer gets changed evidence; the attempt counter increments and the total stays within initial+2
human_checks: confirm the second dispatch was a fresh implementer with changed context
confirm the attempt counter incremented and stayed within the ceiling
confirm only one commit after success
